ddls:
CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "cbsa" TEXT /* Core Based Statistical Area name */,
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* Code for the Core Based Statistical Area */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "days_with_aqi" INTEGER /* Total days with recorded AQI data */,
  "good_days" INTEGER /* Number of days classified as 'Good' */,
  "moderate_days" INTEGER /* Number of days classified as 'Moderate' */,
  "unhealthy_sensitive_days" INTEGER /* Number of days classified as 'Unhealthy for Sensitive Groups' */,
  "unhealthy_days" INTEGER /* Number of days classified as 'Unhealthy' */,
  "very_unhealthy_days" INTEGER /* Number of days classified as 'Very Unhealthy' */,
  "hazardous_days" INTEGER /* Number of days classified as 'Hazardous' */,
  "max_aqi" INTEGER /* Maximum recorded AQI during the year */,
  "percentile_aqi_90" INTEGER /* 90th percentile of recorded AQI values */,
  "median_aqi" INTEGER /* Median AQI value for the year */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the CBSA */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the CBSA */,
  "aqi_description" TEXT /* Textual description of the AQI value */,
  "avg_aqi" REAL /* Average AQI value for the year */,
  "aqi_trend" TEXT /* AQI trend over the year */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_cbsa_code FOREIGN KEY ("cbsa_code") REFERENCES cbsa_info ("cbsa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutant_days" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated air quality data entry */,
  "days_co" INTEGER /* Number of days with recorded CO levels */,
  "days_no2" INTEGER /* Number of days with recorded NO2 levels */,
  "days_ozone" INTEGER /* Number of days with recorded Ozone levels */,
  "days_pm2_5" INTEGER /* Number of days with recorded PM2.5 levels */,
  "days_pm10" INTEGER /* Number of days with recorded PM10 levels */,
  "avg_co" REAL /* Average CO level for the year */,
  "avg_no2" REAL /* Average NO2 level for the year */,
  "avg_ozone" REAL /* Average Ozone level for the year */,
  "avg_pm2_5" REAL /* Average PM2.5 level for the year */,
  "avg_pm10" REAL /* Average PM10 level for the year */,
  "max_co" REAL /* Maximum CO level for the year */,
  "max_no2" REAL /* Maximum NO2 level for the year */,
  "max_ozone" REAL /* Maximum Ozone level for the year */,
  "max_pm2_5" REAL /* Maximum PM2.5 level for the year */,
  "max_pm10" REAL /* Maximum PM10 level for the year */,
  "min_co" REAL /* Minimum CO level for the year */,
  "min_no2" REAL /* Minimum NO2 level for the year */,
  "min_ozone" REAL /* Minimum Ozone level for the year */,
  "min_pm2_5" REAL /* Minimum PM2.5 level for the year */,
  "min_pm10" REAL /* Minimum PM10 level for the year */,
  "pollutant_trend" TEXT /* Pollutant trend over the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollutant_days_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cbsa_info" (
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for each Core Based Statistical Area */,
  "cbsa_name" TEXT /* Name of the Core Based Statistical Area */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the CBSA is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the CBSA as per the latest census */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the CBSA in square kilometers */,
  "number_of_sensors" INTEGER /* Number of air quality sensors in the CBSA */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the CBSA information was last updated */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the CBSA */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person for the CBSA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cbsa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., scientist, policymaker, public) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the CBSA */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_cbsa_code FOREIGN KEY ("cbsa_code") REFERENCES cbsa_info ("cbsa_code")
)
